required_inputs: request intent and requested reporting action
lane scope and adjacent authority map
tenant approval matrix and signoff ownership
refusal_triggers: request asks for agronomic, veterinary, environmental, food-safety, certification, insurance-adjuster, grant-approval, legal, financial, or final submission signoff
request asks the lane to publish or certify unsupported metrics, disclosures, or program submissions
request requires field, animal, environmental, or regulated interpretation outside documented scope

required_inputs: authoritative public source list with refresh and decay metadata
jurisdiction, crop year, season, product, program, facility, land, livestock, and audience
source recency, system timestamps, and tenant source-precedence rules
refusal_triggers: required jurisdiction, program, crop-year, land, livestock, facility, or reporting-context fact is missing
source baseline has decayed for the requested submission, disclosure, or program use
public guidance, tenant policy, agency instruction, certifier finding, and retrieved records materially conflict

required_inputs: reporting period, crop year, farm, tract, field, facility, lot, livestock group, product, and program identifiers
farm, land, production, traceability, livestock, environmental, food-safety, organic, crop-insurance, grant, and program records
source timestamps, preparer notes, reviewer comments, approval history, and retention requirements
refusal_triggers: authoritative field, livestock, land, traceability, environmental, food-safety, or program records are incomplete or unverifiable
metric, report, submission, or disclosure lineage cannot be tied to named records
requested claim is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
record locations and retrieval hooks
seasonal, weather, land, livestock, production-cycle, reviewer, and approval dependencies
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing records, owners, or access paths
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
record location or retrieval hook is missing
seasonal, production-cycle, environmental, livestock, reviewer, or approval dependency is unresolved

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
metric ambiguity, stale-data, source-conflict, seasonal-dependency, disclosure-risk, and signoff-risk indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact or authority source is missing
source data is incomplete, stale, or conflicting
required review or approval is missing for the requested report, disclosure, or submission

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact and evidence requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with evidence, blockers, and owner
refusal_triggers: request is outside agricultural reporting assembly, tie-out, caveat, and escalation scope
request requires agronomic, veterinary, environmental, food-safety, insurance, certifier, grant, legal, financial, or final signoff authority
request requires judgment or approval that the lane cannot make

required_inputs: requested metric, report, disclosure, or submission
crop year, season, production cycle, audience, and cadence
public standard, agency instruction, tenant definition, unit conversion, and source-system lineage
refusal_triggers: metric definition is ambiguous or disputed
unit, scope, crop-year, land, livestock, traceability, or environmental boundary is missing
source records do not support the requested metric

required_inputs: source records and reporting template
field, lot, livestock, environmental, food-safety, program, and approval records
caveat, threshold, and review requirements
refusal_triggers: required source records are missing
review notes or signoff gates remain open
package would imply completeness, compliance, causality, or certainty not supported by records

required_inputs: claim, disclosure, or submission requested
supporting source records
reviewer and signoff authority map
refusal_triggers: stakeholder asks for a claim or disclosure not supported by data
request asks to certify program, food-safety, organic, environmental, crop-insurance, or agency submission readiness without required review
request asks for causal, agronomic, veterinary, environmental, legal, or policy conclusions outside lane authority

required_inputs: crop year, season, planting, harvest, grazing, storage, and production-cycle status
field, tract, common land unit, lot, livestock group, weather, and environmental context
tenant rules for interim versus final reporting
refusal_triggers: seasonal, field, land, livestock, lot, or production-cycle dependency could materially change the output
weather, field condition, harvest status, or lot reconciliation is unresolved
request asks for final reporting before required production-cycle records close

required_inputs: environmental, food-safety, animal-welfare, traceability, and program risk indicators
applicable public source, permit, standard, certifier finding, or tenant policy
adjacent owner and signoff path
refusal_triggers: food-safety, environmental, animal-welfare, or grant-compliance interpretation is required
field conditions or regulatory interpretation change the answer
request asks the lane to imply agronomic, veterinary, environmental, food-safety, or program signoff without explicit scope
